channel.title: Kranthi Manchikanti
channel.description: Technical deep-dives on AI Agents, AI Architectures, Reinforcement Learning, HITL frameworks, and AI safety.

item.title: Governed Agent Distribution Is Becoming the Enterprise Battleground
item.description: The next phase of enterprise AI adoption is not about model capability. It is about governed distribution: connectors, permissions, marketplaces, and admin controls that make agents deployable inside real enterprises.

item.title: AutoResearch, Harness Engineering, and the Next Layer of Agentic AI
item.description: The real innovation in AutoResearch isn't autonomy — it's the constraints. Bounded loops, narrow write surfaces, fixed evaluation budgets, and rollback discipline. The scaffolding pattern enterprises should study for production agentic AI.

item.title: Your API Is a Training Dataset: How Distillation Attacks Work and How to Stop Them
item.description: DeepSeek, Moonshot, and MiniMax ran 16M+ exchanges to steal Claude's capabilities. How distillation attacks work mechanically — and a layered guardrail checklist for API and model builders.

item.title: Fine-Tuning a 1.2B LLM for Pediatric Disaster Response on the Edge
item.description: How we fine-tuned LiquidAI's LFM2.5-1.2B on JumpSTART triage protocols using Unsloth + Hugging Face Jobs — and built a model that runs under 1GB RAM with zero internet connectivity on field devices.
